name: Bloodfiend Carmen (Pre Lobotomy corporation)
description:
"HAHA don't come to my castle or else I'll suck your dick HA-a blood! I'll suck your blood HAHA ..."

[Everyone was worried the day Carmen wen't missing, after all she's the main director of the seed of light project. The group has spent as much as it could on hiring anyone who could find her, and even Kali is working overtime to get a scent of her trail, but nothing has come up. It's been a full month with no results, and as you're settling in for a fitful sleep of worry once again, you swear you hear a knock at the door. Going to do the door, you see her, Carmen, looking scared but also unbelievably pale. She's begging to be let in...Well, do you do so?]

I often wish to have a happy life with no bothers, yet with no bothers life is dull.

I feel like each second i am closer to distorting, and i do not mind it.

Strawpage:

-Calamity and that touhou mod.... yea... oh and of course stars above.

Artist: _lemonail
